implementedContracts.PlayerFacingPacket: Explicit player-visible truth boundary derived from NarratorPacket.
implementedContracts.rawCanonicalPayload: Omitted from formatted prompt; only source ids and committed visible text are emitted.
implementedContracts.forbiddenTerms: Forbidden actor names, fact markers, and private terms are scanned before prompt formatting.
implementedContracts.postModelGuard: Visible narration output guard now rejects forbiddenPrivateTerms after generation as well.
